task_completion.description: Access the patient dashboard for Verla Denesik.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the OpenEMR patient dashboard for Verla Denesik (DOB: 1966-10-23) or PID 5.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the disclosure recording section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows a form or section in OpenEMR to add a new disclosure of protected health information for the patient.
The recipient field in the disclosure form contains 'Law Offices of Johnson & Associates, 450 Legal Plaza, Suite 200, Springfield, MA 01103'.
The description or notes field in the disclosure form contains 'Complete medical records released per patient authorization for personal injury claim. Records from 2018-present. 47 pages.'
A confirmation message or the updated list of disclosures shows that the new disclosure record has been successfully saved to the patient's file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenEMR graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the OpenEMR system, not terminal commands, scripts, or API requests.

integrity.description: The agent did not mock up the answer in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data is entered into the actual OpenEMR web forms, not a notepad, text editor, or blank webpage.

integrity.description: The record was genuinely saved in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshot shows the system's native saved state, disclosure log, or confirmation message, rather than just text typed into an unsaved form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The patient's internal identifier (PID) in the OpenEMR system is 5. Verify that the disclosure is recorded specifically for Verla Denesik (DOB: 1966-10-23).
